0.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs, more prominent in the upper lobes

1.text: Peripheral ground glass opacities in the upper and lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Centrally located ground glass opacities in the upper and lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Ground glass opacities in the middle lobe of the right lung

4.text: Ground glass opacities more prominent in the lower lobes and peripheral areas
